text:
In the vast expanse between galaxies, there lived a solitary monk named Seraph. Seraph was an ancient being, years of meditation etched into his weathered face. Despite solitude, he cherished his only companionship—the star-filled cosmos.

One night, as Seraph gazed upon the twinkling stars, he felt a peculiar shift in his tranquility. A soft melody filled the space around him, not emitting from any instrument but from the very essence of the universe itself. Intrigued, Seraph followed the sound. It led him deeper into space until he found a celestial body unlike any he had seen before—a luminous pearl pulsating with a haunting, beautiful tune.

Curiosity got the better of him, and he ventured closer. To his astonishment, the pearl opened, revealing a chorus of voices—one human, one extraterrestrial, and a multitude of stars. They welcomed him warmly, revealing themselves as fellow travelers stranded on this isolated planet.

Together, they spent days
